title: Remove Argent Script and Mirexa AI Chat entries
author: withthatway

gist.headline: Pruning the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: Did a little tidying up in the Greenhouse to keep our community app showcase fresh and up-to-date.
gist.summary: Removed inactive entries for Argent Script and Mirexa AI Chat from the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Ensures the Greenhouse directory only points to active, working projects for users exploring the ecosystem.
gist.visual_concept: The Greenhouse is a literal garden/greenhouse metaphor. Pruning dead leaves or sweeping up. Polly the bee with a tiny broom or pruning shears, keeping the garden tidy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a tiny 8-bit bee character wearing a gardener's apron, gently sweeping up fallen leaves in a glowing digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a tiny 8-bit bee character wearing a gardener's apron, gently sweeping up fallen leaves in a glowing digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
